zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Menges Jr.於1619年12月12日出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀布斯塔爾時，他的父親Peter Menges Sr.38歲，母親Anna Margaretha Staub39歲。他於1643年與Eva Margaretha Stab在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1685年9月19日在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Menges Jr.于1619年12月12日出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀布斯塔爾时，他的父亲Peter Menges Sr.38岁，母亲Anna Margaretha Staub39岁。他于1643年与Eva Margaretha Stab在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1685年9月19日在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Menges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from an altered form of the personal name   Magnus  .
German: from the personal name Me(i)ngoss, from ancient Germanic magin ‘strength, might’ + gōt ‘Goth’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of Hungarian Mengesz, a surname of German origin (see above).

variants.name: Manges
meanings: Probably Scottish: variant of Menzies , of which the traditional pronunciation is Mingies.

variants.name: Magnus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Bernd, Egon, Erwin, Kurt, Otto, Reinhard, Volker, Wilhelm, Wolfgang.

German, Flemish, and Walloon: from the personal name Magnus, which is from the Latin adjective magnus ‘great’ or a Latinized form of a short form of ancient Germanic compound names based on the element magan ‘strength, might’. The name was borne by several early Christian saints, including St. Magnus (8th century), a monk in St. Gallen in Switzerland and missionary in Allgäu in southern Germany, whose real name was Magnoald. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). In Belgium, it may also be a Latinized (humanistic) form of Walloon Legrand .

English, Scottish, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, and North German: from the Scandinavian personal name Magnus, borne by Magnus the Good (died 1047), king of Norway and Denmark, who was named for the Emperor Charlemagne, Latin Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’, under the impression that Magnus was a personal name. The name spread from Norway to the eastern Scandinavian royal houses, and became popular all over Scandinavia and thence in the English Danelaw. It has also been adopted as a Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Menges Jr. was born on 12 December 1619, in Hebstahl, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse, his father, Peter Menges Sr., was 38 and his mother, Anna Margaretha Staub, was 39. He married Eva Margaretha Stab in 1643, in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 19 September 1685, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Menges Jr. est né le 12 décembre 1619, à Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, son père, Peter Menges Sr., avait 38 ans et sa mère, Anna Margaretha Staub, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Eva Margaretha Stab en 1643, à Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 septembre 1685, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Menges Jr.(이)가 1619년 12월 12일 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브스탈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Menges Sr.(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Margaretha Staub(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1643년 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 브이르펠든에서 Eva Margaretha Stab(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1685년 9월 19일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Menges Jr. nasceu em 12 de dezembro de 1619, em Hebstahl, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen, seu pai, Peter Menges Sr., tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Anna Margaretha Staub, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Eva Margaretha Stab em 1643, em Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Menges Jr. родился 12 декабря 1619 г. в местности хебстахл, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен, его отцу по имени Peter Menges Sr. было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Margaretha Staub, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva Margaretha Stab в 1643 г. в местности бирфелден, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 сентября 1685 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен.

Se casó con Eva Margaretha Stab en 1643, en Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
